channel.title: प्रवेशः Entry on विश्वासस्य जालक्षेत्रम् Vishvas's website
channel.description: Recent content in प्रवेशः Entry on विश्वासस्य जालक्षेत्रम् Vishvas's website

item.title: स्वप्नेषु का भाषा?
item.description:
अस्मिन् विषये कदाचित् मात्रा +Pushpa Dikshit वर्यया चर्चितम्।गतरात्रौ तावदेवम् स्मरामि। (अधः स्वप्नकथने लिटं प्रयुञ्जे।)

प्रथमे स्मृते स्वप्ने पित्रा सह प्रयातुर् मे ऽपकर्तॄन् दुष्टशुनकान् पलायनात् परं पुनराक्रम्य ताडयन्नहं मातृभाषां हेब्बारतमिळं बभाषे पितरमुद्दिश्य (शुनकानुद्दिश्य कया भाषितमिति न स्मर्यते - आङ्ग्लमिति चिन्तयामि)।

द्वितीये स्मृते स्वप्ने कस्मिंश्चिन् मन्दिरे दुर्गासूक्तं वदता केनचिद् वृद्धब्राह्मणेन “शन्योः” इति विशिष्य प्रयोगे कृते, अन्येषु विप्रेषु “शं योः / शय्ँयोः” इति साधुर् भवति इति चर्चयत्सु (प्रादेशिकभाषाभ्यां), तत्र कारणं किमिति वचने असमर्थेषु च, मया “अनुस्वारस्य ययि परसवर्णः” इत्यादिकमवादि संस्कृतेन।

item.title: कालिफ़ोर्नियायां कार्यकर्तृदृढीकरणकार्यक्रमः
item.description: जनवरीमासस्यैकादशे दिनाङ्के संस्कृतभारत्या कालिफ़ोर्नियाराज्यस्य सुन्निवेलनगरे आयोजिते कार्यकर्तृदृढीकरणकार्यक्रमे उपचत्वारिंशज् जना आगताः। युवत्या विद्यालयछात्रया वारिजाख्यया कार्यक्रमोऽयं दक्षतया चालितः। तत्प्रेरणया तत्रोपस्थितेन प्रत्येकेनाऽपि स्वपरिचय-दायित्व-वचन-पुरस्सरं कृतं तत्रत्यान्यजनस्य कस्यचन सद्गुणकीर्तनम्, येन सभा मैत्रिभावपूर्णताम् अगात्। संस्कृतभारत्या अमेरिकाराष्ट्रसङ्घटनमन्त्री पद्मकुमारार्यो ऽभाषत। भिन्नैर् दृष्टान्तैश् चतुरैस् तेन कार्यकर्तृलक्षणानि स्थिरता-सरलता-सहकार-सन्तोष-सौम्यत्व-प्रभृतीनि प्रतिपादितानि। स्मेरमुखैस् संस्कृतभारतीकार्यकर्तृभिः परिवेष्टेन स्वादुभोजनेन समं सहृदयैस् साकं‌ स्वादुसम्भाषणानि अप्यजायन्त प्रायेण संस्कृताध्ययनकेन्द्रितानि। अनेनोप्तानां संस्कृतप्रसारणसङ्कल्पात्मकबीजानां फलानि कौतुकेन प्रतीक्षामहे!

item.title: 2025-06-27 जगद्-उपादान-कारणम्
item.description:
rAmAnuja, madhva, shankara, bhAskara, abhinavagupta

brahma=upAdAna kAraNa? rAmAnuja, madhva, shankara, bhAskara, abhinavagupta

विस्तारः (द्रष्टुं नोद्यम्)

00:00 - Intro. 00:45 - upAdAna kAraNa / material cause 01:15 - nimitta kAraNa / instrumental cause 01:45 - causes of pot 02:15 - cause of jagat 02:45 - upAdAna is brahman + avidyA? shAnkara illusion 03:15 - upAdAna is brahman? - svAbhAvika bhedAbheda - abhinava-gupta, yAdava-prakAsha 04:45 - upAdAna is brahman + upAdhis? - bhAskara aupAdika-dvaita 05:35 - upAdAna is prakRti, not brahman - madhva, nayyAyikas 06:00 - savisheShAdvaita/ vishiShTAdvaita - rAmAnuja. body of brahman is upAdAna. 07:30 - dismissal of shAnkara illusion 08:10 - dismissal of bhAskara aupAdika-dvaita 11:00 - dismissal of svAbhAvika bhedAbheda - abhinava-gupta, yAdava-prakAsha 14:40 - anIk tivAri’s dismissal of madhva, nayyAyikas 16:00 - pUrvapaxa 17:00 - opposition of shabda - pAncharAtra Agama - ahirbudhnya-saMhitA 18:44 - nirvikAratA 21:00 - spider weaving web 22:20 - states of the body 23:45 - Opposition of “dissolution into the material cause” shruti 24:20 - Opposition of “meditate on the material cause” shruti 25:20 - Conclusion

item.title: 2026 04 13 - aitihyas
item.description:
Vid

mAmuni on vyAsa, rAmAnuja tower rahasya broadcast - myths and sources, aitihya pramANa-level

विश्वास-टिप्पनी

Source: TW

00:00 - mangalam 00:30 - Intro 01:45 - Good wishes, intent 02:12 - Challenge 1 - manavALa mAmuni vs parAshara-bhaTTa on vyAsa 03:30 - tattva-traya quote 04:26 - alasinga-bhaTTa’s commentary on sAttvata-saMhitA chapter 9 05:26 - mUla 05:56 - commentary 07:22 - saumya-jAmAtR - sAxAd-avatAra-s 08:42 - veda-vit = vyAsa as per parAshara bhaTTa 10:10 - viShNu-purANa on kRShNa-dvaipAyana 10:30 - mAmuni on kRShNa-dvaipAyana 11:20 - mAmuni agrees that other vyAsa-s are AveshAvatAra-s. 12:10 - Challenge conclusion 13:10 - “Spreading misinformation”? No. Trustworthy. 14:10 - Challenge 2 - rAmAnuja rahasya-broadcast 15:50 - GV Iyer rAmAnuja 1989 movie - tower scene 17:40 - Comments on the movie, credits. Lakshmitatachar of melukote plays the lead. 18:20 - Myth propagated by tenkalai AchAryas 19:25 - Alkondaville Govindacharya’s 1906 book, propagted by Chinna Jeeyar’s JET trust (Jeeyar education trust) 20:00 - Betrayal story narrated there 21:45 - Proof of prevelence and propagation 23:00 - Join me in countering such! 24:00 - Challenge Conclusion 24:40 - guru-paramparA-prabhAva-aitihyas not proper pramANa. 26:00 - “rAmAnuja held a shUdra after bath” myth 26:30 - “shUdra-bhAgavata touch after cooking” myth (correction - i’m told it’s a nampillai story) 27:00 - Our attitude to aitihya-s.

item.title: 2026 04 14 - sadanuShThAna-darpaNa fraud
item.description:
Playlist TW

Videos

vaishvadeva avoidence

Source: TW

विस्तारः (द्रष्टुं नोद्यम्)

vaishvadeva avoidance, devatAntara-pUjA, pAncharAtra vs smRti/ sUtra, sad-anuShThAna-darpaNaH

00:00 - Intro, amAvAsya rituals, sthAlIpAka, aupAsana
01:45 - tenkalai shrIvaiShNava claims. 02:30 - Hypocritical unread claim to be Apastamba-sUtra, brahma-sUtra, rAmAnuja followers while opposing vaishvadeva. 02:50 - instagram person’s (bharatan?) confusion 05:00 - Actually brahma-sUtra-s and rAmAnuja’s shrI-bhAShya require nitya-karma anuShThAna with either antaryAmi bhAvanA or etymological understanding. 06:30 - साक्षाद् अपि जैमिनिः। etymological understanding of deity names to refer to bhagavAn 07:15 - parAshara-smRti does not forbid. 07:35 - Confusion extends to vaidikas 08:45 - Why even do sandhyAvandanam etc.? 09:30 - sad-anuShThAna-darpaNa quotes “vAsudeva-saMhitA” (typo - मध्याह्नानन्तरं → मद्यागानन्तरम्). (Edit - seemingly available in manuscript form.) 12:00 - Verse can be understood otherwise - show us the context. 12:45 - Overridden by smRti-s 13:15 - yAmuna’s Agama-prAmANya says so. 15:00 - yAmuna thought sva-shAkhokta nitya-karma abandonment to lead to loss of varNa. 18:50 - Frauds in सदनुष्ठानदर्पण (sad-anuShThAna-darpaNa/ sadanushtana/sadanuShThAnadarpaNam / sadhanuShThAnadarpaNam / sadhanuShTAnadarpaNam/ Sadanushtanadarpanam) by shuddha-sattva-varadAchArya - https://archive.org/details/Vaishvadeva/sadanuShThAna-darpaNaH_d2/page/45/mode/1up . 20:45 - Availability of highly respected kANva-shAkhAnuyAyins in TN. 22:50 - Conclusion

item.title: 2026 05 29 rAma - brahmin killer?
item.description:
rAma a brahmin-killer? data, common sense, smRiti, rAmAyaNa vs purANas, films on rAmeshvara-linga.

https://youtu.be/e6SHd3P5PQA

विस्तारः (द्रष्टुं नोद्यम्)

Low audio fix - To increase audio volume - use extension like “Volume Booster for YouTube” Source: TW

00:00 - mangalam 00:40 - Intro. rAma-brahma-hatyA claim. rAvaNa as purohita! dharmAtmA rAma sinned? 03:30 - tryambaka-makhI yajvan (1665-1750) tanjore marATha. strI-dharma-paddhati, dharmAkUta. jammalamadaka-srinivas’s input. 07:20 - varNa of rAvaNa’s parents. pulastya → vishravas + rAxasI = rAvaNa. 08:40 - rAxasa-kShatriyatva. rAkShasas are kShatriyas. 12:25 - CORRECTION - hiraNyAxa, hiraNyakashipu, prahlAda & bali were asura-s, not rAxasa-s. Replace with vibhIShaNa. 13:00 - Brahminhood from inter-jAti union with a Brahmana male? Data. vyAsa, dhRtarAShTra, pANDu, vidura, parashu-rAma. 16:00 - rAvaNa’s vRtti, nitya-homa-s, Sama Veda prowess, Shiva Bhakti, vibhIShaNa’s sadyash-shaucha. 19:23 - vAlmIki’s & rAma’s opinion 21:55 - dharmAkUta/ dharmashAstra on mAtR-jAti-dharma-prApti (mUrdhAvasikta kShatriya-dharma), pitR-jAti-sAdRshya. Ranking. 25:44 - Exceptions - savarNAlAbha. visheSha-viShaya - vRttAdi-lingAni. 27:50 - rAvaNa’s “brAhmaNya” not possible from exceptions. (vishravas + brAhmaNI = kubera.) 30:35 - adhyAtma-rAmAyaNa says he’s kShatriya. 32:00 - skanda, pAdma purANa-s say he’s brAhmaNa. 34:00 - brahma-hatyA-doSha exceptions - AtatAyin. Parallel to strI-hatyA-doSha in case of tATakA. kushAgra’s comment. 37:15 - brahma-hatyA-doSha exceptions - AchAra & patitatA. 37:45 - Primacy of rAmAyaNa. itihAsa vs purANa. purANa hierarchy. smRtis even higher. 41:30 - Utility of rAma-kathA - dharma-bodha sans exceptions vs shabarI-soiled-food, brahma-hatyA. 46:00 - Verdict - dharmashAstra, vAlmIki, rAma vs skanda-purANa etc. 47:30 - No fake expiation as loka-sangraha instruction - lack of adhikAra; dambha. 50:00 - Laukika intent - tamas, praxepa, shaiva jealously. Cult competition. 54:20 - purANa intent. arthavAda-signs. rAmeshvara-praise. setu-mAhAtmya. 58:10 - adhikAri-bheda. 59:00 - Conclusion - No brahma-hatyA. No expiation.

item.title: 2026-02-17 Nitya karma abandonment
item.description:
Source: TW

Videos

Source: TW

gauDIya vaiShNavas & nitya karma, varNa-Ashrama-dharma, jIva-gosvAmI, baladeva, kRShNa, jaisingh 2

विस्तारः (द्रष्टुं नोद्यम्)

00:00 - A noble gauDIya vaiShNava mlechCha family 01:36 - nitya-naimittika-karma commitment question 02:45 - Credits and sources (not agreement, ofc) 03:45 - chaitanya, sanAtana-gosvAmI सनातन-गोस्वामी 1488–1558 04:50 - jIva-gosvAmI जीव-गोस्वामी 1513 – 1598 05:30 - bhAgavata-purANa primacy - natural commentary of brahma-sUtra-s, gauDIya vaiShNava mistake in focus. **** 07:55 - तावत् कर्माणि कुर्वीत - jIva-gosvAmI on the shAnkara shrIdhara-gosvAmI.
11:40 - भक्त्य्-आरम्भ एव तु स्वरूपत एव कर्म-त्यागः कर्तव्यः । - jIva. 12:45 - deliberate abandonment of nitya-karmas - बुद्धिपूर्वकता 13:50 - Exceptions - कथञ्चित् क्रियमाणम् अपि … 17:00 - Instructing नित्य-कर्म-त्याग to others. Degeneracy risk. 18:55 - Other exceptions 19:40 - Commentary (BP) opposing the original (BS)? A flaw. **** 20:55 - Unnecessary complexity of decision in abandoning karma - sign of misunderstanding **** 23:30 - विश्वनाथ-चक्रवर्ती 1626–1708 follows jIva 25:30 - baladeva vidyAbhUShaNa बलदेवः 1700–1793 **** 26:00 - jayasiMha 2/ sawai jaisingh, Arya company, rAmAnandi (?) tradition 27:30 - brahma-sUtra-govinda-bhAShya. baladeva’s dilemma 28:46 - baladeva’s hack - lokasangraha applies to all AshramI-s. 30:00 - अनभिभवं च दर्शयति ॥ ३.४.३५ - sUxmA-TIkA 31:50 - Covering a mistake with another 33:00 - Correction to jIva 33:40 - Good job in ensuring non-degeneracy. **** 35:00 - bhagavad-gItA charama-shloka commentary - confirmation 37:20 - kRShNa-deva-sArvabhauma कृष्णदेव-सार्वभौम-भट्टाचार्यः (1750) 38:15 - prameya-ratnAvalI commentary - आश्रमस्थः प्रतिष्ठितो लब्ध-महद्-आसनश् चेत् ॥ 41:00 - Modern gauDIya vaiShNava-s T kRShNa-dAsa parroting jIva gosvAmI **** 42:55 - hari-dAsa-bAbA hindI “translation” - suggests kAmya-karma-tyAga 44:45 - baladeva vidyAbhUShaNa camp - modern acceptance 46:40 - Conclusion, good wishes towards gauDIya vaiShNava victory.

item.title: 2026-03-13 shUdra bhAgavatas mAmuni
item.description:
विस्तारः (द्रष्टुं नोद्यम्)

00:00 - mangalam 00:40 - Intro, context 02:27 - Bharathan/ azhagiyavaradar, a vAnamAmalai shiShya?! 03:30 - vyAsa’s mahAbhArata - kRShNa as dUta in udyoga-parva, refuses duryodhana, bhIShma, droNa food, takes vidura food. 04:45 - shAstri-vAvilla recension verses - duryodhana’s objection 08:30 - kRShNa’s response - commitment to dharma, no Apat - won’t accept food from haters. 11:45 - vidura’s reaction. 12:50 - lokAchArya 13:20 - shrI-vachana-bhUShaNa “sUtras” regarding bhAgavata shUdra-s 17:30 - manavALa mAmuni’s (=saumya-jAmAtR) commentary on eating at vidura’s house 21:30 - bhakti-bhAva overrides varNAshrama dharma? 22:50 - rAma eats from shabarI’s hand? 23:45 - manavALa mAmuni’s commentary - saliva-soiled fruits fed by shabarI’s hand to a happy rAma?! 25:20 - Contradiction with “great knowlege” of shabarI, acquired from serving sages. 26:00 - English translation, tamiL original. 28:15 - bhagavAn pleased if bhakti-bhAva overrides varNAshrama dharma per manavALa mAmuni. 28:44 - Follow your AchArya-s, if non-hypocrites. Offer saliva-soiled food, hire shUdra-bhAgavata-cooks in temples. 29:50 - Accept venkaTanAtha’s correction. 30:42 - vedantAchArya’s correction - vidura followed jAti-dharma. 31:40 - vidura-episode faithfully recollected, modulo objection, eating sequence. 35:30 - vidura’s shUdra jAti and varNa not denied by kRShNa. 36:10 - Apastamba allowed Arya-s accepting cooked food from a dhArmika shUdra 38:00 - Contrast among lokAchArya, manavALa mAmuni and vedAnta deshika 40:10 - Bharathan/ azhagiyavaradar’s accusation of fraud 41:10 - bhArata-sAvitrI is NOT the source - mahAbhArata is. 42:00 - bhArata-sAvitrI is a condensation 43:00 - Misrepresentation of vedAnta-deshika - v4 bhAgavata-s to be respected by v1-s within dharmashAstra bounds. 44:00 - bhagavAn is not a self-contradicting drunk. 44:30 - abhinavagupta & incest - don’t be like that. 45:45 - na shUdrA bhagavad-bhaktAH - also from mahAbhArata (Ashvamedhika parva). 46:30 - qualities of mind vs body. Not in context of kRShNa’s response to duryodhana. Similarly vidura following varNa-dharma in marriage. 48:00 - bhArata-sAvitri vs mahAbhArata - should’ve occured to him 48:45 - sanskrit error - अधिक्रम्य vs अतिक्रम्य 49:15 - False claim of “immediate” response. 50:20 - duryodhana did not “rebuke” vidura. Calling a v4 a v4 is not one. 51:30 - No contest to vidura’s varNa 52:00 - “Regressive” ideas of vedAntAchArya. Justify your AchAryas’ practices. 52:30 - sanskrit error - mRdu-prajnA 53:30 - bhArata-sAvitrI sourcing claim. 55:15 - good weak person in sumo example - both physical & mental qualities matter. 56:20 - Missourcing 57:00 - Who goes to hell? Respecting bhAgavata chaNDAla-s. 59:00 - Challenges welcome. We’ll show how VD corrects your (AchAryas’) errors. VD is your AchArya - accept corrections. Open to accepting our AchArya’s errors if proven. 1:00:10 - Suggested to tenkalais - vAdikesarI ALagiya manavALa jIyar - a positive example. 1:01:10 - Ok to accept errors like manavALa mAmuni contradicting own AchArya parAshara-bhaTTa, sadanuShThAna-darpaNa’s fake shata-patha brAhmaNa quote. 1:02:50 - pramANa hierarchy. 1:04:00 - aitihya lowness. rAmAnuja’s mantra-rahasya broadcast myth. 1:04:50 - shabari saliva feeding - no valid pramANa. bhuShuNDi-rAmAyaNa a kAvya. rAmeshvara-linga-pUjA by rAma. 1:05:40 - To Tenkalai brothers - understand pramANas, shAstra-s well. Give up excess abhimAna, durAgraha.

item.title: 2026-04-25 shankara on viShNu Aditya
item.description:
Per shankara, viShNu nArAyaNa = viShNu Aditya, distinct from arjuna, ravi / sun etc..

Source: TW

विस्तारः (द्रष्टुं नोद्यम्)

00:00 - mangalam 00:20 - Intro, shrI jammalamadaka-shrInivAsa hosted by aham brahmAsmi foundation of shRngeri pITha. 01:00 - shankara was not “popular vaiShNava”? 01:24 - “Popular” vaiShNava meaning 02:15 - shrI jammalamadaka-shrInivAs’s claim from https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=fQi3LkrZ74E&t=749s 04:50 - wikipedia on the Aditya (son of aditi) viShNu 05:50 - shankara’s understanding matches. 06:25 - kRhSNa is controller of mAya, is saguNa brahma, distinct from jIva arjuna etc. in vyAvahArika-sattA. avatAra vs rebirth. 07:25 - “AdityAnAm ahaM viShNuH” - same sense as “vRShNInAM vAsudevo smi” 09:20 - shrI jammalamadaka-shrInivAsa’s mistake propogation, retreat from challenge claiming “non-relevance” - https://x.com/jamvasu/status/2047895453887578294 . 10:20 - Conclusion, recap. bhAShya should be clear by itself; but being twisted.

item.title: 2026-05-26 Ahobila AchAryas tenkalai lies
item.description:
koil-kandADai-aNNAvappangAr

“tenkalai ahobila mutt AchArya” lies - koil-kandADai-aNNAvappangAr, uttamUr-veerarAghavAchAryar

विस्तारः (द्रष्टुं नोद्यम्)

00:00 - mangalam 00:50 - Intro. Early ahobila AchArya-s tenkalai? 02:30 - How to distinguish tenkalai from vaDakalai? Beliefs & practices vs tilaka. 03:40 - Disagreement on laxmI’s siddhopAyatva as a test. 08:00 - IDu commentary use doesn’t distinguish tenkalais from vaDakalais. 09:15 - Context on ahobila maTha. 10:10 - 2nd ahobila-yati nArAyaNa-muni 11:00 - rahasya-traya-jIvAtu - https://dn721806.ca.archive.org/0/items/shrI-vaiShNava-tattva-granthAH/rahasya-traya-jIvAtu-samIxA.pdf gajalaxmI Thesis, editing errors, manuscripts. 13:00 - upAyatva accepted, vedAnta-deshika’s arguments presented. 20:00 - puruShakAra-only statements explained away as emphasis.
25:00 - Evidence easily available. 25:30 - vedAnta-deshika quotes 26:35 - Lies of 19th CE koyil-kandADai-tirumaLHisai-aNNAv-appangAr 32:30 - Colophon referers to draviDa-vedAntAchArya (CORRECTION - refers to keshavAchArya, not venkaTanAtha). 34:15 - Other works - vedAnta-deshika - nyAsa-viMshatiH. 34:25 - Other works - commentary on vAdikesari aLagiya manavALa jIyar’s adhyAtma-chintA. Honest explanation of author’s opinion. 38:30 - Counter examples of others twisting author’s words in commentaries - 20th CE kAnchI aNNangarAchArya, shrI-yadugiri-rAma-mishra on vedAnta-deshika venkaTanAtha, nArada. 41:00 - Profusely quotes vedAntAchArya. 42:55 - Commentary does not mean agreement - examples - Appayya dIxita. 44:00 - 14th ahobila-yati nArAyaNa-muni - पुरुषकार-मीमांसा। shakuntalA-thesis. Blog post at https://vansatakopadaya.wordpress.com/2025/03/08/puru%e1%b9%a3akara-mima%e1%b9%83sa-vicara/ 48:35 - uttamUr-virarAghavAchArya fooled - Intro to (vedAnta-rAmAnuja) sAkShAt svAmi’s shrI-tattva-siddhAnjanam. Speculation about nArAyaNa muni. 50:45 - Confuses 2nd and 14th nArAyaNa-muni-s. Misrepresents nArAyaNa-muni. 52:55 - vibhutva of lakShmI. 53:50 - sympathy for tenkalais? 54:15 - 19th CE (sholingapura?) mahAchArya’s misleading - IShopaniShat bhUmikA first edition - missing. 56:20 - uttamUr vIrarAghavachArya’s verses 58:00 - IShopaniShat bhUmikA first edition - missing - please send 58:45 - crude language regarding nArAyaNa muni’s intent. 1:00:45 - ahobila-maTha’s error - non-publication, claiming “texts are lost”. 1:02:45 - 18th ahobila yati - nArAyaNa muni. tenkalai story. 1:03:45 - teacher of Koyil Kandadai ANNan per AchArya-vaibhava. Got dashAvatAra-sannidhi, ranganAtha. 1:07:00 - 1st ahobila yati. Teacher of 2nd yati - enough said. IDu. ghaTikA-shatam’s student, not kandADai aNNan’s. Was a convert or always deshika-para. Eitherway tenkalai myth busted. 1:09:35 - ahobila-maTha respect. orthodoxy. anuShThAna book popular among good tenkalais. conversion copes, heterodoxy. 1:11:15 - Conclusion. Recover from mistakes, don’t make it into a tradition.

item.title: Calendar कार्यावकाशसूचिः
item.description: Direct link.

item.title: Dharma Via Vishvas
item.description:
PS: In case you’re wondering - the below sponsorship invitation has mostly been futile, and we’ve relied on family funds. (Details- dyuganga org page.)

Intro

Donate to Dharma via Vishvas if you:

  • like his creations and endeavors (described below), to which he is incidentally dedicated full-time
  • trust him to honestly use all money received here towards dharma.
  • either agree with his worldview, or acknowledge to yourself that it differs from yours.

PS: Vishvas is an individual - donations made via him are not tax-deductible.

item.title: Google site search
GopAla-bhaTTa - facts vs stories
item.description:
• mangalam
  • Topic. Mainstream story vs facts vs better theory.
  • gopAla-bhaTTa intro. Counted among 6 gosvAmi-s of vRndAvan. Family shrine in shrIrangam. Continued regard by gauDIya-s - https://youtu.be/WlRKVl8mGbg https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Qwqj0w0819E&t=134s
  • mainstream story about gopAla-bhaTTa. Narahari Cakravartin. abhaya-charaNa AC bhaktivedAntasvAmI prabhupAda.
  • “Under the wing” of rUpa and sanAtana.
  • Internal disputations - parents’ death? chaitanya alive? rAmAnujIya yati “prabodhAnanda-sarasvatI”? sannyAsa?
  • Supposed works - commentary on the Kṛṣṇa-karṇāmṛta (kRShNa-vallabhA), an earlier alankAra-shAstra commentary, Sat-kriyāsāra-dīpikā, hari-bhakti-vilAsa
  • ShaT-sandarbha contributions
  • Credible bits - Meeting chaitanya 1510 CE?, arrival in vRndAvana in mid 1530s post age 30.
  • pAncharAtra dIxA, basic rAmAnujIya education. consecration of temples.
  • sanAtana and rUpa - with tough muslim court political / admin background, abandon varNa-dharma, start an unorthodox religious movement in vRndAvana. chaitanya far away in puri.
  • colophon of kRShNa-karNAmRta commentary - श्री-द्राविड-हरिवंश-भट्टैक-चरण-शरण-श्री-गोपाल-भट्ट. Other AlankArika commentaries.
  • “vaiShNava smRti” hari-bhakti-vilAsa thrust on him by sanAtana. (hari-bhakti-vilAsaH/meta/authorship) Mans Broo comment. An open secret. “शिवे च परमेशाने विष्णौ च परमात्मनि । समबुद्ध्या प्रवर्त्तन्ते”
  • ShaT-sandarbha abandonment. Obscure vAdikesari-saumya-jAmAtR (ALagiya manavALa jIyar) cited. Sparse shrI-bhAShya 1.1, 2 citations in initial sandarbhas. (ShaT-sandarbhaH/meta/contributions)
  • jIva was made by rUpa and sanAtana to write it (“रूप-सनातनौ विलेखयतः”).
  • Lived for 20+ years after ShaT-sandarbha completion. Did not actively help or hinder jIva & co’s program.
  • respectful mentions of gopAla-bhaTTa by sanAtana and jIva, not as a helper. even shrIdhara-svAmI is glorified by gosvAmins. Liberal with vRddha-vaiShNava-s.
  • Rift with Kṛṣṇadāsa Kavirāja. Denied permission for inclusion to Kṛṣṇadāsa Kavirāja Gosvāmī (chaitanya-charitAmRta) as per Narahari Cakravartin in 18th CE. The latter’s kRShNakarNamRta commentary did not use his commentary.
  • Had students (one sent by jIva) and admirers in vRndAvana.
  • shrIvaiShNa-puNDra use by his parivAra.
  • Official story problems. द्राविड-हरिवंश-भट्टैक-चरण-शरण, Abandonment of sandarbhas, acknowldegement as non-sahAya by sanAtana and jIva. “prabodhAnanda-sarasvatI”. sannyAsa.
  • Sat-kriyāsāra-dīpikā foisting, shrAddha-non-performance. Counter-religion.
  • Story to better fit facts. Arrival. Disagreement with rUpa and sanAtana. (ShaT-sandarbhaH/meta/contributions)
  • Initial cooption. Building an unorthodox religious movement, but wanted to insert some heft from a progressively unwilling orthodox bhakta.
  • Wisening up, retirement. R & S recruit nephew jIva. gopAla not helping jIva and kRShNadAsa.
  • Good wishes for vaiShNava growth. Consecrations. Some archanA training.
  • Continued shrIvaiShNava affiliation. “Belonging” meaning. puNDra. tridaNDi-sannyAsa?
  • baladeva-vidyAbhUShaNa. mAdhva identity.
  • Feeback welcome.

item.title: jIva
item.description:
• मङ्गलम्
  • jIva & life. आत्मा।
  • आत्म-ज्ञान-प्रयोजनम् - शास्त्रेषु प्रशस्तम्। मोक्ष-पुरुषार्थः। धर्मः, स्वर्गादि-फलानि।
  • आत्म-लिङ्गानि - प्रत्यक्त्वम्, आनुकूल्यम्, प्रतिशरीरम् एकत्वम्। शरीर-धारकत्वम्।
  • अहम्-अर्थ आत्मा। अहं खादामि। अहं जानामि। मम शरीरं जर्जरम्। मत्-प्राणाः कण्ठगताः। ममात्मोत्क्रामति शरीरात्।
  • इदम्-अर्थ-भिन्नः। अयम् ममात्मा। इमे मत्-प्राणाः। इदम् मच्छरीरम्।
  • निर्विकार-श्रुतिः। पुनर्-जन्म।
  • ज्ञान-विशेष आत्मा? ज्ञान-धर्मी, ज्ञान-स्वरूपः। अणुः। नित्यः। अभौतिकः।
  • अन्याः कल्पनाः। विभुः। शरीरात्मवादः। प्राणात्मवादः।
  • ईश्वर-सम्बन्धः - भेदाभेदः। भेदः। शरीरि-शरीर-भावः।
  • प्रत्यक्षतः परीक्षा।
  • प्रत्यक्त्वम् – “इदम् अन्तर् इदम् बाह्यम्” इति प्रज्ञा कृमिष्व् अपि। अहम्-प्रयोग-सारः।
  • Biology - cell theory. Schleiden and Schwann 1830s.
  • Planaria cut into two.
  • HeLa cell line (Henrietta Lacks died in 1951). Trillions - tons.

item.title: kAnchy-aNNangarAchArya facts
item.description:
विस्तारः (द्रष्टुं नोद्यम्)
  • kAnchi aNNangarAchArya intro. Genius. Slander. Misrepresentations. Idolization.
  • No bhAgavatApachAra intended. Post-death bhAgavatApachAra? yoga-bhraShTa stories by sages.
  • No padma award for kAnchI aNNangara.
  • Repudiations; 1954 DTT; by a housewife.
  • 1911 jail sentence for repeatedly slandering a bhAgavata convert to deshika-sampradAya (Ozhapakkam Ramanujachariar)
  • 1950 apology for temple physical assault.
  • bhAgavatatva regard. “मद्-भक्तोऽपि न वैष्णवः” “साधुर् एव स मन्तव्यः”

item.title: Respect & standards
item.description:
Respect for fraud?

these examples acknowledge the mutual respects irrespective of differences. - @Tiruvadi

The original commenter is right, using terms like “fraud”, “degenerate” etc. makes it look like you are not ready to debate respectfully. - @ChipSqueax

There’s a clear difference between a respectful philosophical discussion and what comes across as personal attacks. - @prathamkare694

But what respect you want us to show to frauds? To the extant that they were flawed bhAgavata-s, yes I respect them. Not beyond that.

item.title: shAstra-errors
item.description:
विस्तारः (द्रष्टुं नोद्यम्)

  • shAstra - अप्राप्ते हि शास्त्रम् अर्थवत्।

  • jyotiSha errors/ vedAntin physics errors - https://youtu.be/k0c-y1pzTI8

  • pauruSheyatva of shAstra-s. vyAsa. parAshara. manu. brahma - guNa-influence. Avesha.

  • Metallurgy - Brass Pb dangers. Roman lead pipes, Andhra coins, chinese ceramics. Iron vessels & chaNDAlatA. Iron vs steel. mud / stone.

  • Maximum leeway domains.

  • Food - A glass of raw milk typically contains 20,000 to 200,000 live somatic cells per milliliter. Beef? Since unfertilized haploid cell - Farm chicken egg. Onion. Egg in body, fertilized?

item.title: shrInivAsa-rAjan misc
item.description:
विस्तारः (द्रष्टुं नोद्यम्)
  • SR’s confusions - ekAyana an actual veda-shAkhA. Not against pAncharAtra augmentation (5-kAlas from mahAbhArata)! Purpose of Agama-prAmANya. kali-varjyas, shiShTAchAra. Bigotry.

item.title: Spaceship earth
item.description:
Spaceship earth

  • In a world(s?) of limited resources, we, and our “civilization” will grind to a halt, likely on this very “Spaceship Earth” - sooner or later, gracefully or otherwise based on whether wisdom is in charge. The wise amongst us may not have much chance, but while we’re around, may our consciousness expand to the limits reachable.

agrahAra sought

A more rural lifestyle is more sustainable (especially considering the inevitable oil/metal… exhaustion) - https://escholarship.org/uc/item/9js5291m . Currently, returning to the village is not practical for me (family interests can’t be satisfied), but would be very interested in atleast offering a good option to my progeny. The brief flash of life and prajNA on this planet should last as long and as strongly as possible - so, atleast some people should strive to be non-short-sighted, and think in timelines spanning centuries or millennia.

item.title: VedAntin physics errors
item.description:
tattva-muktA-kalApa error

Source: TW

vedantin physics errors- shankara, madhva, venkaTanAtha (not full-avatAras) vs AryabhaTa, bhaTTatiri

विस्तारः (द्रष्टुं नोद्यम्)

Ref - https://vishvasa.github.io/jyotiSham/astrophysics/history/heliocentrism_spherical_flat_earth/#aryabhata-500-ad

00:00 - mangalam
00:30 - Intro
01:00 - Physics - Earth rotating on it’s axis.
01:40 - AryabhaTa. boat analogy.
03:55 - Fits intuition. Relative motion, velocity, acceleration. See https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_VE6RQWndTA
05:20 - brahmagupta, varAhamihira didn’t grok.
05:45 - baTTatiri vs appayya - star-moon-rising-order flip.
10:25 - Intuitive for careful sky-watchers.
11:50 - shankara’s error in ChandogyopaniShat, dramiDAchArya
15:25 - madhva’s error (Ananda-tIrtha)
16:30 - vijaya-dhvaja, vAdIrAja, appayya-dIxita, vallabha, gauDIya vishvanAtha-chakravartI etc.
18:30 - venkaTanAtha’s error in tattva-muktA-kalApa (Correction - meant arrow instead of bird?). sarvArtha-siddhi error - https://youtube.com/shorts/Bd4v38ir-jI
21:30 - Relative velocity. Newton’s v = u + at. See https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_VE6RQWndTA
23:00 - Traditionalist acknowledgements - Veliyanallur Narayanachariar - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=9e2wrJ-rcOg “ok for his time”.
24:20 - KS varadAchArya - only-earth movement excuse.
26:10 - bhUgola-nirNaya. contra-pratyaxa. contra-AryabhaTa / jyotiSh-shAstra
28:15 - yogi -pratyaxa / contemporary-science copes.
29:05 - KS varadAchArya’s message - spritual science vs physical science lag. “घृष्ट्वा घृष्ट्वा परीक्षया … सम्यङ् विनिश्चित्य वक्तव्यं … नो चेल् लुप्येत श्रद्धादिः”. tapas.
34:30 - Limitations acknowledged - “उपयुक्तेषु वैशद्यम्”, “तत्र तूदासितव्यम्”।
39:00 - Domain of expertise - vedAntAchArya, not physics/ biology/ metallurgy/ history/ paleontology AchArya. सारासार-विवेकः
39:50 - Not an avatAra - Imagination of the astounded. “उत्प्रेक्ष्यते बुधजनैर् उपपत्ति-भूम्ना घण्टा हरेः समजनिष्ट यद्-आत्मनेति” इति वेङ्कटनाथः। “वेङ्कटेशावतारोऽयं तद्-घण्टांशो ऽथवा भवेत्। …” इति कुमारवरदः। Avesha. (Correction- in piLLaiy-antAdi, kumAra-varada identifies venkaTanAtha as venkaTeshvara.)
48:00 - venkaTanAtha, madhva, shankara - Not venkaTesha/ vAyu/ shiva themselves. Limitations.
50:20 - Extensions to shAstra-kRts like vyAsa, brahma, etc..
50:50 - Copes
51:40 - Limitations of synthesizers/ nirNaya-kRts.
52:36 - History, metallurgy, biology deficiencies.
53:00 - Conclusion. Truely following vedAnta-deshika’s foundational principles. pratyaxa supremacy.

item.title: जालक्षेत्रमिदमन्विष्यताम्
रहस्योपदेशादि
item.description:
वेदाः

  • विश्वासः - उपनयन-संस्कारः, समावर्तनम्
    • पिता वासुकिः। सम्पत्-पुरोहितस्य +आर्त्विज्ये।
    • विवाहः २०१० वर्षान्ते।
  • सुप्रत्ययः - उपनयनम् २०२२०६
  • वज्रयुध्मः - उपनयनम् २०२४०३

परवस्तुपरम्परया सामानि (५०)

  • विश्वासस्य शिक्षा - परवस्तु-गोपालः, San Jose. २०१८०५ - २०१९०२
  • परम्परा ऽत्र ।
  • सुप्रत्यय-वज्रयुध्मयोर् उपनयनाद् आरभ्य।

तैत्तिरीय-शाखाध्ययनम्

  • अध्ययनम् अत्र - उच्चारणानूच्चारणरूपं शब्द-राशि-ग्रहणम्।
  • आचार्येण साम्प्रदायिकम् प्रचलद्-उच्चारणम् आश्रितम्, छात्रैश् च “आदिरस्योदात्तसमः शेषो ऽनुदात्तसम इत्याचार्याः॥१.४६॥ सर्वः प्रवण इत्येके॥१.४७॥ " इति तैत्तिरीयप्रातिशाख्योक्त-स्वाभाविकम् उच्चारणम्।
  • प्राजापत्यं काण्डम्
    • चतुर्वेदी प्रदीपसिंहः - २०२५-०४ तः २०२६-०३-०१।
      • गुरुः - पेजावर-यतिर् विश्वप्रसन्न-तीर्थश् चतुर्-वेदी। तस्माद् भट्टभास्करान्वितो द्राविडपाठः पठित आरण्यकस्य।
    • चॆन्नै-वासी KN-रमेशः - प्रथम-प्रश्न एव।
      • सौकर्यार्थं पदपाठे सति, स एव ग्राहितः।
    • २०२४-११-१७ रवि-वासरः (तदैव व्रतग्रहणम्) - २०२५-०१
विस्तारः (द्रष्टुं नोद्यम्)

पेजावर-यतिर् विश्वप्रसन्न-तीर्थश् चतुर्-वेदी ← वेङ्कट-सुब्बावधानी मैसूरु-नगराद् आनीतः (अदमारु-मठस्य विद्यामान्यतीर्थेन प्रायेण)।
(ततो मध्वार्यवृन्दावने ऽपि पठितम् - यतेर् गुरुर् यतिस् स्याद् इति।)

item.title: वधू-विज्ञापनम्
item.description:
(Short URL - https://rebrand.ly/vadhU )
(२०३०-वर्ष-परिसरे प्रचारार्थं रचितोऽयम् प्राग्-लेखः। )

द्वाभ्याम् अ-साधारण-वराभ्याम् असाधारणे वधू अन्विष्येते -
सत्-समृद्ध-प्रजा-प्रधानाय गृह-मेधाय।
अखिलम् पठित्वा सम्पर्कोऽत्र विधेयः।

वर-परिचयः

२०१५ इति वर्षे ऽमेरिका-सङ्घटित-राज्ये जातः सुप्रत्ययः,
२०१९ वर्षे तत्रैव जातश् च वज्रयुध्मः।

कुलादि

हॆब्बार्-श्रीवैष्णवस्य श्रीवत्स-गोत्रस्य विश्वासस्य वासुकि-सुतस्य, अगस्त्य-गोत्रोद्भवायाः श्रुत्याश् च पुत्रौ।
कर्णाटेषु कल्याणपुर्यां (बॆङ्गळूरु-नगरे) वर्धितौ।

संस्कारः, शिक्षा

आजन्म-संस्कृत-भाषिणौ, अल्पे हि वयसि सूपनीतौ।
काञ्ची-ताताचार्य-कुलानुगृहीत–श्रीवैष्णव-पञ्च-संस्कार-समन्वितौ।
भगवत्-सेवोचित-कलासु गीत-नृत्य-जप-होमादिषु सुशिक्षितौ।
पाकोऽपीषज् ज्ञातः।
ब्रह्मचर्ये नित्य-समिद्-आधान-सन्ध्यावन्दन–देव-ब्रह्म-पितृ-यज्ञ–तर्पणादि-परौ।
एकादशीसु सकृद्-भुक्त्य्-अवलम्बिनाव् उपवसतः।
सदैव प्रायेण शिखोपवीतोत्तरीय-वेष्टि-तिलक-कुण्डलादि-भूषितौ - क्रीडापत्-कालान् विहाय।
कासाञ्चन देवतानां मन्त्रोपासनम् अपि कुरुतः।

item.title: विश्वासाशिष्टता
item.description:
Also, on a lighter but still sincere note what’s with the French bread in your videos? What kind of anushtana permits that? - @prathamkare694

With such questions, please clarify the intent of the question and the source of your objection to practice X.

Education intent
If your intention is to educate me or yourself about practice X,
you may, at the outset itself, cite the relevant pramANa (say shAstra vAkya or shiShTAchAra);
and I will consider it.

item.title: वैचारिक इतिहासः
item.description:
Top intellectual influences

  • Darwin
  • Euclid and geometers
  • pANini/ patanjali
  • Newton
  • Gaius Sallustius Crispus
  • Apastamba + dharmashAstrakRts
  • MT @blog_supplement
  • tirumalai kRShNamAchArya
  • UG Krishnamurti
  • Computer programming
  • shatAvadhAnI gaNeshaH
  • @GuruAnaerobic
  • @Rjrasva
  • @nntaleb

कुतो ऽयम् आलेखः?

स्वकथा लिखिताः काश्चिद् बुधादेशोऽभवद् यदा। तदंशं निक्षिपाम्यत्र द्विरुक्तिः कस्य रोचते॥

“अतिपरिचयात् अवज्ञा”, “अप्रियम् सत्यम् मा‌ ब्रूयात्” इति च+उक्ती+अविस्मृते। परन्तु भवत्सु शास्त्रज्ञा अनुभाविनः कवयः परिचितबहुदृष्टिकोणा मुख्यतरेषु रोचकतरेषु बौद्धिकेषु+उद्योग-योजनासु सत्स्व् अपि मद्विचारान् च तदितिहासं च ज्ञात्वा स्नेहेन क्षमया च परिष्कारम् वा आक्षेपम् वा प्रतिस्पन्दरूपेण कुर्युर् इति मत्वा पूर्वोक्तयोर् नीत्योर् असङ्कुचित-कृतप्रमादो ऽस्मि।

item.title: संपर्कः Contact
item.description:
For future reference:[firstName]= vishvas,[lastName]= vasuki

Saying my name: vish-vaas vaa-suki. 信.

Asynchronous

Email:

  • [firstName].[lastName]ATT gmail.com

You can verify my messages by using:

  • this public PGP key.

Voice/text-messaging IM!

Number used below +९१ ९५९१२६८५०६

  • telegram (TE)
  • whatsapp - https://rebrand.ly/ask-vv-wa

Internet chat:

I very rarely (almost never) use instant messengers.

  • Google talk, yahoo, skype:first name [dot] last name.

Anon message

You can send me an anon message here.

Professional and Social Networking websites:

In case we know each other, you may keep track of me (and discuss common interests) on these sites:

item.title: सर्व-कर्म-सन्न्यासापेक्षा
item.description:
• गीतायां शाङ्कर-वचनम्
  • अप्पय्य-वचनम्
  • आधुनिक-शाङ्कर-सङ्ग्रहः
